description: Shared WFC edge socket type vocabulary. Socket types define what can be adjacent on each side of an object or tile.

wall_face.description: Wall surface — objects placed against walls

shelf_mount.description: Wall-mounted shelf or decoration attachment point

counter_end.description: Bar counter connection point for extending counters

furniture_edge.description: Edge of a furniture piece (table, bench) — needs floor nearby

nature_edge.description: Edge of natural feature (plant, water) — needs floor nearby

void.description: Edge that must not connect to anything (map boundary)
